hero.title: Quality packaging for every harvest.
hero.subtitle: Fruit covers, leno mesh bags, and PP woven bags — made right here in Andhra Pradesh. Trusted by farmers and businesses across India.

productsOverview.title: Three products, built for every need.
productsOverview.lead: From orchard to warehouse — protective covers for fruits, mesh bags for vegetables, and heavy-duty woven sacks for grains and fertilizer.
productsOverview.detailsLink: See detailed specs for all products →

beforeAfter.title: See what fruit covers do.
beforeAfter.lead: Mangoes grown without protection develop spots, insect marks, and sun damage — selling for half the price of clean fruit. Covers pay for themselves in the first harvest.

mainCta.title: Need a bulk quote? Talk to us directly.
mainCta.description: WhatsApp us your requirement — quantity, product, and delivery location. We reply within 1 hour with pricing and delivery estimate.
